name: typography-h1
visual_summary: Typography-h1 is a high-contrast, large heading element used to draw attention to a title or main heading on a page. It should be used for the primary title of a web page or section. This component is ideal for emphasizing key content and creating a clear visual hierarchy.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready typography component with the following characteristics:

Name: typography-h1
Description: Typography-h1 is a high-contrast, large heading element used to draw attention to a title or main heading on a page. It should be used for the primary title of a web page or section. This component is ideal for emphasizing key content and creating a clear visual hierarchy.
Style: default, high-contrast
Interactions: 
Tags: heading, typography, h1, title, main heading

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
